subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad! Be not grieved by all that We have attributed unto thee, for whatsoever proceedeth from the Beloved is beloved. Stand thou, then, steadfast [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا محمد لاتحزن عن کل ما نسبناک لان کلما یظهر من الحبیب محبوب ثم استقم علی
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
